shopping_348.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1.  **Incomplete Item Addition:** The agent failed to add all compatible items from the page. It only added two items, while there were more compatible items visible on the page (and potentially more if scrolling was performed).
2.  **Lack of Comprehensive Compatibility Check:** The agent did not systematically evaluate all products on the page against the provided socket image (Type B/North American standard). It stopped prematurely after adding only a couple of items.
3.  **Failure to Scroll:** The agent did not scroll down the page to view all available items, potentially missing compatible products that were below the initial view.
shopping_348.REFLECTION: For future attempts, first, clearly identify the socket type from the image (e.g., Type B/North American). Then, systematically go through *all* items on the page, including scrolling down to reveal more products. For each item, carefully examine its description and product images to determine if its plug is compatible with the identified socket. If an item requires an option (like color), select any available option before adding it to the cart. Ensure all compatible items are added before concluding the task.
